thai_name: จาร์ศักดิ์
lock_method: Use official reveal reference images as source of truth. Text prompt alone is not sufficient.

identity.default_wardrobe: black knit shirt, dark smart casual, simple watch
identity.face: Thai male, oval face, warm natural skin tone, calm eyes, approachable smile
identity.hair: short natural black hair with soft texture and side volume

approval_rule: Reject any output that does not match the face lock close-up and master portrait.
recommended_ai_reference_strength: 70-90% when the tool supports image reference strength.
training_note: For near-100% repeatability in AI generation, train a LoRA or character model using the included references plus approved additional angles.
